data.biography: Kayla Wallace is a Canadian actor, singer, and dancer. She is best known for her work on The Magicians (2020), ABC's The Good Doctor (2017), and her role of 'Fiona Miller' on Hallmark Channel's When Calls The Heart (2019- 2021). Wallace was born in Victoria, British Columbia where she later attended The Canadian College of Performing Arts upon completing high school. She was heavily involved in theatre, dance, singing and piano throughout her childhood and developed a strong passion for film & television.
data.name: Kayla Wallace

data.biography: Kayla Wallace (geboren am 31. Oktober 1993 auf Vancouver Island, British Columbia) ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin, Sängerin und Tänzerin, die vor allem durch ihre Rolle als Fiona Miller in der Hallmark-Serie „When Calls the Heart“ bekannt wurde. Ihre berufliche Laufbahn begann mit einem Engagement als Tänzerin und Chorsängerin im Disney-Fernsehfilm „Descendants“ (2015), es folgten Auftritte unter anderem in „The Good Doctor“, „The Magicians“, „Zoey’s Extraordinary Playlist“ sowie in zahlreichen Fernsehfilmen wie „Once Upon a Prince“, „Counterfeiting in Suburbia“, „Undercover Cheerleader“, „Heatwave“, „Feeling Butterflies“ und „My Grown-Up Christmas List“. Seit 2024 spielt sie zudem die Rolle der Rebecca Falcone in der Serie „Landman“ und gilt damit als fest etabliert im nordamerikanischen TV- und Streaming-Bereich

Rikke Louise Andersson is a Danish actress.
data.name: Rikke Louise Andersson

data.biography:
Rikke Louise Andersson (født 13. marts 1972 i København) er en dansk skuespillerinde.

Hun har gøglet og spillet teater, fra hun var ganske lille, bl.a. i børneteatertruppen Gawenda. Som 12-årig blev hun headhuntet af Anette Pilmark til at medvirke i tv-serien Ludo. Hun har også medvirket i serierne TAXA, Strisser på Samsø og Anna Pihl.

Rollen som luderen Joyce i Nattevagten indbragte hende Bodilprisen for bedste kvindelige birolle i 1995
data.name: Rikke Louise Andersson

data.biography: Richard Dormer is a Northern Irish actor, playwright and screenwriter.  He was born in Lisburn, Northern Ireland. After to being accepted to the Royal College of Art Richard accepted a scholarship at the RADA school of acting in London. After living and working in London, he returned to Northern Ireland. He lives in Belfast and is married to director Rachel O'Riordan.  Dormer is perhaps best known for his performance as Northern Irish Snooker star, Alex Higgins in Hurricane, which he wrote and starred in. The production received praise from critics and even from Higgins himself and saw Richard win The Stage award for best actor in 2003. He is currently the bookie's third favourite to play Higgins in the scheduled film of his life behind Cillian Murphy and Jonathan Rhys Meyers. In 2004 Richard won the Irish Times Best Actor Award for his performance in Frank McGuinness's Observe the Sons of Ulster Marching Towards the Somme and in 2005 completed a season with Sir Peter Hall at the Theatre Royal and performed Bath in the George Bernard Shaw play, You Can Never Tell, William Shakespeare's,Much Ado About Nothing, Noël Coward's play, Private Lives, and in a production of Samuel Beckett's Waiting for Godot.  Since, Dormer has written a number of plays including The Half and Gentleman's Tea Drinking Society which were produced through Belfast's Ransom theatre company. He has also provided the voices for over twenty BBC Radio 4 plays, documentaries and advertising campaigns.  Following a run of film castings playing secondary characters, he was cast as the lead in the 2012 Good Vibrations which tells the story of Northern Ireland personality and punk rock visionary Terri Hooley. The film premièred at the 2012 Cannes Film Festival and was awarded 'best film' at the Galway film awards. 2012 also saw Dormer taking over the role of Lord Beric Dondarrion, known as the "Lightning Lord", the leader of the "Brotherhood Without Banners" for Season 3 of HBO series Game of Thrones.
data.name: Richard Dormer

data.biography: 理查德·多默（Richard Dormer）是北爱尔兰演员，剧作家和编剧。他出生于北爱尔兰的利斯本。在被皇家艺术学院录取后，理查德接受了伦敦RADA表演学院的奖学金。在伦敦生活和工作后，他回到了北爱尔兰。他住在贝尔法斯特，与导演雷切尔·奥里奥丹（Rachel O'Riordan）结婚。多默最出名的可能是他在《飓风》中饰演北爱尔兰斯诺克明星亚历克斯·希金斯的表演，他编剧并主演了这部电影。这部作品得到了评论家甚至希金斯本人的赞誉，理查德在 2003 年获得了舞台奖最佳男主角奖。他目前是博彩公司第三喜欢在他生命中预定的电影中扮演希金斯的人，仅次于基里安·墨菲和乔纳森·里斯·迈耶斯。2004年，理查德因在弗兰克·麦吉尼斯（Frank McGuinness）的《观察阿尔斯特之子向索姆河进军》中的表演而获得爱尔兰时报最佳男演员奖，并于2005年在皇家剧院与彼得·霍尔爵士（Sir Peter Hall）合作，并在乔治·伯纳德·萧伯纳（George Bernard Shaw）的戏剧《你永远无法分辨》（You Can Never Tell），威廉·莎士比亚（William Shakespeare）的《无事生非》（Much Ado About Nothing）中表演巴斯。 诺埃尔·科沃德（Noël Coward）的戏剧《私人生活》（Private Lives）以及塞缪尔·贝克特（Samuel Beckett）的《等待戈多》（Waiting for Godot）的制作。从那以后，多默写了许多剧本，包括《一半》和《绅士的饮茶社》，这些剧本都是通过贝尔法斯特的赎金剧团制作的。他还为20多部BBC Radio 4电视剧、纪录片和广告活动配音。在一系列扮演次要角色的电影选角之后，他被选为 2012 年《Good Vibrations》的主角，该片讲述了北爱尔兰个性和朋克摇滚梦想家 Terri Hooley 的故事。这部电影在 2012 年戛纳电影节上首映，并在戈尔韦电影奖上被授予“最佳影片”奖。2012 年，多默还接替了被称为“闪电领主”的贝里克·唐达里恩勋爵的角色，他是 HBO 系列《权力的游戏》第 3 季“无旗兄弟会”的领导人。
data.name: 理查德·多默

data.biography:
理查德·多默（Richard Dormer）是北愛爾蘭演員，劇作家和編劇。他出生於北愛爾蘭的利斯本。在被皇家藝術學院錄取後，理查德接受了倫敦 RADA 表演學院的獎學金。在倫敦生活和工作後，他回到了北愛爾蘭。他住在貝爾法斯特，與導演雷切爾·奧里奧丹（Rachel O'Riordan）結婚。多默最出名的可能是他在《黑罪風雲》中飾演北愛爾蘭斯諾克明星亞歷克斯·希金斯的表演，他編劇並主演了這部電影。這部作品得到了評論家甚至希金斯本人的讚譽，理查德在 2003 年獲得了舞台獎最佳男主角獎。他目前是博彩公司第三喜歡在他生命中預定的電影中扮演希金斯的人，僅次於基裏安·墨菲和喬納森·里斯·邁耶斯。2004 年，理查德因在弗蘭克·麥吉尼斯（Frank McGuinness）的《觀察阿爾斯特之子向索姆河進軍》中的表演而獲得愛爾蘭時報最佳男演員獎，並於 2005 年在皇家劇院與彼得·霍爾爵士（Sir Peter Hall）合作，並在喬治·伯納德·蕭伯納（George Bernard Shaw）的戲劇《你永遠無法分辨》（You Can Never Tell），威廉·莎士比亞（William Shakespeare）的《無事生非》（Much Ado About Nothing）中表演巴斯。

諾埃爾·科沃德（Noël Coward）的戲劇《私人生活》（Private Lives）以及塞繆爾·貝克特（Samuel Beckett）的《等待戈多》（Waiting for Godot）的製作。從那以後，多默寫了許多劇本，包括《一半》和《紳士的飲茶社》，這些劇本都是透過 通過貝爾法斯特的贖金劇團製作的。他還為 20 多部 BBC Radio 4 電視劇、紀錄片和廣告活動配音。在一系列扮演次要角色的電影選角之後，他被選為 2012 年《Good Vibrations》的主角，該片講述了北愛爾蘭個性和朋克搖滾夢想家 Terri Hooley 的故事。這部電影在 2012 年戛納電影節上首映，並在戈爾韋電影獎上被授豫“最佳影片”獎。2012 年，多默還接替了被稱為“閃電領主”的貝里克·唐達裏恩勳爵的角色，他是 HBO 系列《權力的遊戲》第 3 季“無旗兄弟會”的領導人。
data.name: 理查德·多默

data.biography: Julianna Layne is an American actress and singer.
data.name: Julianna Layne

data.biography: Born in Tokyo in 1964. Graduated from the Architectural Department of the Faculty of Engineering of Tokyo University in 1988. Studied film production at the Image Forum Institute of the Moving Image and was recognized for his 3-hour long thesis film "The Film of Buddy Matsumae" ("Matsumae-kun no eiga" 1989). His film "Swimming Prohibited" won the Special Juror's Prize at the 1990 Image Forum Festival. Moved to Kochi City in 1991, and in 1992 directed the Jurgen Brunning production "Tarch Trip" ("Tachi torippu" 1993). Directed his first 35mm fiction film "I Like You, I Like You Very Much" in 1994. In 1996 his "Heaven-6-Box", a production of the Kochi Musuem of Art, won the NETPAC Prize at the 1995 Berlin International Film Festival. Recently he has been involved in performing live music at screenings of his work. (www.yidff.jp)
data.name: Hiroyuki Oki
